'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 94''' was the ninety-fourth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[October 15]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*The Evacuation of [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin]]
*[[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]]
*[[Mirith Sinn]]
*[[Borsk Fey'lya]]
*[[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] - [[Theed Spaceport/Legends|Theed Spaceport]]
*[[TDL nanny droid]]
*[[Lars homestead/Legends|Lars moisture farm]] kitchen
*[[Hang-glider/Legends|Ewok hang glider]]
